description: Torchlight Infinite Netherrealm difficulty display rules for UE_game.log parsing.

notes: Use AreaLv as the primary difficulty signal when it appears near LevelMgr/MapName events.
MapOrder is not difficulty; observed 5단계 map logged MapOrder 8.
LevelUid can be used as a fallback because observed Netherrealm LevelUid values encode the same internal level after the leading 10 prefix, e.g. 104 -> AreaLv 4, 106 -> AreaLv 6.
Observed 8-0 on a non-season server with AreaLv 9 and LevelUid 1091101; difficulty parsing should not depend on season server state.
Observed 아득한 8단계 with AreaLv 12 and LevelUid 1121109.

Observed 딥 스페이스 with AreaId 2000, AreaLv 13, LevelUid 1132004, and a normal-looking map path such as /Game/Art/Maps/01SD/SD_DaHuangZhiYe200; do not detect Deep Space by checking for Deep_Space in the UE map path.
